name: Pecan Log Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butterscotch morsels over hot, not boiling, water.
2. Remove from heat and stir in sweetened condensed milk, vanilla, and pecans.
3. Chill until firm enough to handle.
4. Roll tightly on waxed paper to form 12-inch rolls.
5. Brush with egg whites.
6. Roll in additional chopped pecans.
7. Chill and slice.
